complaint: A red hybrid system warning came on with a 'Check Hybrid System' message and the car beeped at me, I'm afraid to drive it thinking the battery could catch fire.
observations: Warning triggered by 12V auxiliary battery undervoltage, not the HV pack
12V battery tests weak/old, HV system codes absent
EV and hybrid drive function normal after 12V recharge, intermittent message on cold mornings
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target '12V auxiliary battery'.
